channel.title: RVA Figure Drawing
channel.description: Figure drawing sessions in Richmond, VA

item.title: Fri, Jul 17 · 6:30 PM – 9:00 PM — Open Figure Drawing
item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.

item.title: Sun, Jul 19 · 1:00 PM – 4:00 PM — Figure Drawing Open Session - July 19, 2026
item.description: Location: Art Works Inc, 320 Hull Street, Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: $12.51 | RVA Thriving Artists is hosting an open figure drawing session at Art Works. Bring your own materials and easel. Donation pays the model's fee.

item.title: Tue, Jul 21 · 10:30 AM – 12:30 PM — Morning Figure Drawing at Artspace
item.description: Location: Artspace, 2833-A Hathaway Rd., Richmond, VA 23225 | Cost: $10 | Figure Drawing sessions every third Tuesday of the month. Draw a live model for 2 hours! $10 donation at the door. Chairs provided. Bring your own drawing materials/board/easel. Open session. All skill levels welcome. Must be over 18.

item.title: Fri, Jul 24 · 6:30 PM – 9:00 PM — Open Figure Drawing
item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.

item.title: Sun, Jul 26 · 10:00 AM – 12:30 PM — Open Figure Drawing
item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.

item.title: Wed, Jul 29 · 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM — Drawn to Life: A Crash Course on Life Drawing
item.description: Location: Unkindness Art, 2923 North Avenue, Richmond, VA 23222 | Cost: $10 | This month's session substitutes the regular monthly figure drawing class with a crash course for newer/casual artists: a presentation on drawing from life followed by a guided figure drawing session with a live clothed model. All ages.

item.title: Fri, Jul 31 · 6:30 PM – 9:00 PM — Open Figure Drawing
item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.

item.title: Fri, Aug 7 · 6:30 PM – 9:00 PM — Open Figure Drawing
item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.

item.title: Sun, Aug 9 · 10:00 AM – 12:30 PM — Open Figure Drawing
item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.

item.title: Fri, Aug 14 · 6:30 PM – 9:00 PM — Open Figure Drawing
item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.

item.title: Wed, Aug 19 · 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM — Queer Life Drawing
item.description: Location: Gold Lion Community Cafe, 1012 Hull St, Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: $10 suggested donation | Queer Life Drawing hosted by RVA Thriving Artists — periodic figure drawing session with live queer-identified models in the community cafe event space.

item.title: Wed, Aug 26 · 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM — Fursuit Figure Drawing
item.description: Location: Unkindness Art, 2923 North Avenue, Richmond, VA 23222 | Cost: $15 | This month's session substitutes the regular monthly figure drawing class with 2-3 fursuit-suited models striking short-pose gestural poses. All ages, no furry experience required.

item.title: Thu, Sep 10 · 1:00 PM – 3:30 PM — Open Figure Drawing
item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.

item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.

item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.

item.description: Location: Gold Lion Community Cafe, 1012 Hull St, Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: $10 suggested donation | Queer Life Drawing hosted by RVA Thriving Artists — periodic figure drawing session with live queer-identified models in the community cafe event space.

item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.

item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.

item.title: Wed, Sep 30 · 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM — Nude Figure Drawing at Unkindness Art
item.description: Location: Unkindness Art, 2923 North Avenue, Richmond, VA 23222 | Cost: $10 | Ongoing nude figure drawing series, 18+ only, valid photo ID required at the door. September session features a single model in a short-pose format for fast gestural sketching.

item.title: Thu, Oct 1 · 1:00 PM – 3:30 PM — Open Figure Drawing
item.description: Location: Drawing East (Visual Arts Center of Richmond), 1812 West Main Street, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $3 tuition + $12 model fee | Open figure drawing session with a live, nude model. No instruction provided; studio monitor guides the session.
